name: hub
description: Aplicação Fullstack com Smart Assist (IA) para gerenciamento de materiais didáticos.

scripts.server: cd backend && (python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload || python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload)
scripts.node: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.env: cd backend && (python3 -m venv venv || python -m venv venv) && (./venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt || ./venv/Scripts/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt) && (npx shx cp -n .env.example .env || npx shx touch .env)
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run node && npm run env
